goal: Bring the lost changes onto master with a visible history.
summary: Recovered lost commit 650dba4 ("Move to Stanford") merged into master as commit e1a37b2 with --no-ff, preserving master's previous tip d7d3e4b ("off the job market woo"). The _includes/about.md content conflict was resolved in favor of the candidate's Stanford bio per user intent; _layouts/default.html auto-merged cleanly. Working tree clean, all 4 success criteria verified.
stepSummaries:
1. Confirm the candidate commit is still reachable and capture its full SHA. Confirm no working-tree changes conflict. [verified]
  2. Merge the recovered commits into master with `--no-ff` so the merge is visible in history. Use a descriptive merge message. [verified]
  3. Verify master contains the recovered changes: clean working tree, expected merge commit on master, and the diff between master and the pre-recovery tip is non-empty. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps used real verification (git rev-parse, git log, git diff, git status, file content reads); step 3 ran the actual smoke verify command `git status && git log --oneline -10` against the live repo.
gateVerdicts.evidence: verification.md; git log -1 --format='%P' returned two SHAs; git diff d7d3e4b..HEAD --stat returned non-empty output.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal — bring the lost changes onto master with a visible history — is met: HEAD = e1a37b2 is a true merge commit (2 parents), both the merge commit and the recovered commit appear in git log, and the resolved files reflect the Stanford content.
gateVerdicts.evidence: _includes/about.md now contains "Postdoctoral Researcher at Stanford CS."; _layouts/default.html tagline is "Postdoc @ Stanford"; git log --graph --oneline shows merge topology.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Pre-existing minor side effect (spurious repo-local user.email/user.name set during the first merge attempt) was cleaned up at the end of step 2.
gateVerdicts.evidence: git config --local --get user.email and user.name both exit 1 (key not set).
